note_text:
Patient: 66M presenting with moderate psoriasis vulgaris.
Conservative management including disease-modifying medication, bracing was attempted over approximately 16 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring dermatology physician requests authorization for biologic therapy.

Patient: 64M presenting with severe psoriasis vulgaris.
Conservative management including immunomodulator therapy was attempted over approximately 5 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with psoriasis vulgaris.
Referring dermatology physician requests authorization for biologic therapy.

Patient: 70M presenting with severe psoriasis vulgaris.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with psoriasis vulgaris.
Referring dermatology physician requests authorization for biologic therapy.

Patient: 54F presenting with basal cell carcinoma.
Conservative management including dietary and lifestyle modification, disease-modifying medication was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with basal cell carcinoma.
Referring dermatology physician requests authorization for mohs surgery.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with basal cell carcinoma

note_text:
Patient: 55M presenting with severe hidradenitis suppurativa.
Conservative management including corticosteroid injection, bracing was attempted over approximately 18 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with hidradenitis suppurativa.
Referring dermatology physician requests authorization for biologic therapy.

Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring dermatology physician requests authorization for biologic therapy.

Patient: 55F presenting with atopic dermatitis.
Conservative management including bracing, NSAIDs was attempted over approximately 13 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with atopic dermatitis.
Referring dermatology physician requests authorization for phototherapy.
